objective: Setup local AI serve environment with Qwen 3.6 models and benchmarking suite.
strategy: Prioritize llama.cpp for CPU/APU stability due to severe 14GB RAM constraint.
Use uv for Python environment management.
Develop a hardware-adaptive benchmark script (detects RAM/VRAM) with isolated subprocess execution.
Benchmark Qwen3.6-35B-A3B (MoE) and Qwen3.6-27B (Dense) with heavy quantization (GGUF 2-bit, Q2_K) exclusively to start.
Deprioritize vLLM/SGLang as they will likely OOM due to PyTorch/KV cache overhead; test only if llama.cpp Q2_K succeeds.
Design benchmark runner to survive SIGKILL (OOM Killer) by using subprocesses and incremental result saving (JSONL).
